positive: A stylish, minimalist portrait of a friendly forest animal—a fox, centered in a lush, highly contrasted silhouette style. The fox is mid-leap, surrounded by stylized geometric foliage and abstract mountain peaks. The color palette must be limited to deep forest greens, burnt orange, cream, and slate blue. Use strong line work and crisp negative space. Composition should be perfectly balanced and symmetrical, designed for central placement on fabric. Inspired by mid-century modern screen prints and Japanese woodblock woodcuts. Flat graphic design, vector art quality, highly detailed, clean lines, high contrast, isolated white background.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, bokeh, messy, photorealistic, gradient, jpeg artifacts
